pathways.name: Swift 2 Adoption Path
pathways.description: Master Swift 2's new error handling, guard, availability checking, and pattern matching. Then learn how protocol-oriented programming and value types reshape API design. The foundation of every other 2015 talk.

pathways.name: Protocol-Oriented Programming Path
pathways.description: Crusty's famous talk plus the value-type companion. Learn the 'don't start with a class' philosophy, protocol extensions with Self requirements, and value semantics with copy-on-write. Then apply with compile-time safety patterns.

pathways.name: iPad Multitasking Path
pathways.description: The structural shift of WWDC 2015. Start with the fundamentals, then optimize media handling and memory pressure. Auto Layout and stack views are essential foundations.

pathways.name: watchOS 2 Native Apps Path
pathways.description: Move your watch extension from the iPhone to native execution on the watch. New frameworks: WatchConnectivity, ClockKit complications, layout/animation. Designing for the wrist follows.

pathways.name: App Thinning, Bitcode & ODR Path
pathways.description: Ship smaller apps via App Slicing, Bitcode for future-proof compilation, and On-Demand Resources for staged downloads. Asset catalog discipline is the foundation.

pathways.name: Search APIs & Universal Links Path
pathways.description: Get your in-app content into Spotlight via NSUserActivity, Core Spotlight, and web markup. Universal Links replace custom URL schemes. Safari View Controller replaces in-app browsers.

pathways.name: Stack Views & Auto Layout Path
pathways.description: iOS finally gets layout containers. Master UIStackView, NSLayoutAnchor, and the new readable content guides. Best practices for performance and adaptivity.

pathways.name: Content Blockers & Safari Extensibility Path
pathways.description: Build a privacy-first content blocker for iOS Safari and Safari View Controller. Plus Shared Links extensions. Web development complements: backdrop filters, scroll snap, ES6.

pathways.name: tvOS Foundation Path (announced)
pathways.description: tvOS launched in fall 2015 — the WWDC talks were game and graphics frameworks that would underpin tvOS apps: SpriteKit, SceneKit, GameplayKit, Metal. Game-style apps use the same foundations on Apple TV.

pathways.name: GameplayKit Path
pathways.description: Apple's first dedicated gameplay framework: ECS, state machines, agents/steering, pathfinding, MinMax AI, random distributions, rule systems. Demo: DemoBots brings them together.

pathways.name: Energy & Performance Path
pathways.description: Hit all-day battery life. QoS through GCD, NSOperation patterns, Energy gauge in Xcode, and the new ATS-driven networking model. Profile, measure, fix.

pathways.name: Core Data & CloudKit Path
pathways.description: Unique constraints, batch deletes, model caching make Core Data substantially more usable. CloudKit gains Web Services with a JS SDK, web Apple ID sign-in, and free pricing tier scaling with users.

pathways.name: Privacy & Security Path
pathways.description: ATS by default, canOpenURL whitelist, rotated identifiers, zero-knowledge public indexing. Plus Apple Pay in apps and Wallet rebrand.

pathways.name: Designing for Apple Watch Path
pathways.description: Three themes: Personal Communication, Holistic Design, Lightweight Interaction. Design with animation. Learn the new system fonts. Plus accessibility for the wrist.
